about.title: Crafting Digital
about.profile: Frontend & Mobile Developer with hands-on experience building high-performance web and cross-platform mobile applications. Proficient in React.js, Vue.js, React Native, and Flutter, with a strong focus on clean architecture, RESTful API integration, and smooth user experiences. Started at ERP-INTEL LLC as an intern and rapidly transitioned to a full-time engineering role through successful module delivery. Passionate about responsive design, state management, and turning complex requirements into elegant, maintainable code.

jobs.description: Building and maintaining cross-platform client-side solutions for enterprise-level products.
highlights: Developing high-performance Frontend dashboards using React.js and dynamic mobile applications using React Native and Flutter.
Optimizing client-side application performance, responsiveness, and state management flow.
Ensuring seamless RESTful API integration between backend microservices and modern user interfaces.
Joined as an Intern and rapidly transitioned into a full-time engineering role due to successful module delivery and fast adaptation.

jobs.description: Developed and maintained scalable, responsive web applications for international clients using React.js and modern frontend technologies.
highlights: Delivered clean, modular, and maintainable code for diverse projects, ranging from custom management dashboards to interactive user interfaces.
Integrated complex RESTful APIs smoothly to ensure efficient data flow and dynamic user experiences.
Managed full frontend project lifecycles independently — from requirement gathering and prototyping to final deployment and debugging.

education.degree: Bachelor of Science in Chemistry and Biology Education

services.title: Mobile App Development
services.desc: Creating high-performance cross-platform applications for iOS and Android using React Native and Flutter with native-like feel.

services.title: Web App Development
services.desc: Building premium, responsive web applications using React.js and Vue.js with advanced state management.

services.title: UI/UX to Code
services.desc: Transforming complex Figma designs into clean, maintainable, and interactive pixel-perfect code.

contact.title: Get In
contact.subtitle: Let's discuss your project
contact.description: I'm always open to discussing new projects, creative ideas or opportunities to be part of your visions.
